description: Returns the branch relay model starting array indices and status. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, ival = rmodind(ibus, jbus, ckt, slot, string)
python_syntax: ierr, ival = rmodind(ibus, jbus, ckt, slot, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the relay model quantity desired. (input).

string.description: number of CON values used by the model.
number of STATE values used by the model.
number of VAR values used by the model.
number of ICON values used by the model.

bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect branch status. For a model to be called during simulations the branch must be in-service and the model’s bypassed flag must be not bypassed.

error_codes.description: branch not in network but in model tables; ‘IVAL’ returned.
branch not in network or in model tables; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
no SLOT ‘SLOT’ model for this branch; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
